lines.speaker: Zavistic Rarve
lines.text: What are you doing ringing that bell?! Don't you think some of us have work to do?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: But I was told to ring the bell if I wanted some attention.

lines.speaker: Zavistic Rarve
lines.text: Well...anyway...we're very busy here, hurry up what do you want?

lines.speaker: Zavistic Rarve
lines.text: What are you doing...Oh, it's you...sorry...didn't realise...what can I do for you?

lines.speaker: Zavistic Rarve
lines.text: Thank you so much for helping to lay Clarence to rest and lock up his murderer!

lines.speaker: Zavistic Rarve
lines.text: What are you doing bothering me? Don't you think some of us have work to do?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I thought you were here to help?

lines.speaker: Zavistic Rarve
lines.text: Well... I am, I suppose, anyway... we're very busy here, hurry up, what do you want?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: What is there to do in the Wizards' Guild?

lines.speaker: Zavistic Rarve
lines.text: This is the finest wizards' establishment in the land. We have magic portals to the other towers of wizardry around Gielinor. We have a particularly wide collection of runes in our rune shop. We sell some of the finest

lines.speaker: Zavistic Rarve
lines.text: mage robes in the land and we have a training area full of zombies for you to practice your magic on.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: What are the requirements to get in the Wizards' Guild?

lines.speaker: Zavistic Rarve
lines.text: You need a magic level of 66, the high magic energy level is too dangerous for anyone below that level.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: What do you do in the Guild?

lines.speaker: Zavistic Rarve
lines.text: I'm the Grand Secretary for the Wizards' Guild, I have lots of correspondence to keep up with, as well as attending to the discipline of the more problematic guild members.
